message:
style(main): rustfmt line-length fixes for long generic type signatures

Wrap 20+ long type signatures that exceeded rustfmt line-length limits,
primarily in distributed module function parameters where
Arc<runtime_compat::Mutex<storage::StorageHandle>> and similar nested
generics were written on single lines. Also wraps RuntimeBuilder chain
and distributed_listener_handle type annotation.

Pure formatting — no behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
